christian-syriac-script-c2av.description: Christian Sogdian, C2AV (Sims-Williams 1985) plates. Sogdian language written in East Syriac script (U+0710). Fine-tuned from Sophro Mhiro Syriac base.

metadata.source_description: Sims-Williams, N. (1985). The Christian Sogdian Manuscript C2 (Berlin, Turfan Collection). Plates.
metadata.notes: Canonical corpus layout. New plates are added by annotating plates/p-NN.png in the browser UI (plate gallery), then exporting GT to gt/. Annotation sessions live under annotation/sessions/{session_id}/.
